creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
I have updated this port for jp-man-1.1f.  And "jman.el" is separated
now, so this port does not depend on Mule.

  I put new port to
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/japanese/ja-man-1.1f-980307.tar.gz

  Thanks.


-- 
Jun Kuriyama // kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
